period.source: GET /defaults; sales+complaints coverage confirms 12 contiguous months

device.cadence: annual (Class IIb, UK MDR 44ZM(6); EU MDR Art. 86(1))

inputs.complaints: blocked — R2 bloc regions (Europe x14, NorthAmerica x12); UK x6 OK pending NI answer; 32 rows, 17 serious, 30/32 pre-coded device_problem, all 12 months covered, Nov-2023 cluster of 16 noted (matches prior open signal)
inputs.capa: pending — 5 rows, columns exact, complaint links resolve; D9 scope confirmations outstanding
inputs.fsca: blocked — regions_affected uses bloc values (NorthAmerica, Europe, Asia) on all 3 rows
inputs.ract: green — 5 hazards, max_expected_rate all raw fractions (ledger #1), global overall_serious_rate_max 0.005
inputs.pms_plan: green — period matches 2023-01-01..2023-12-31, 4+ planned activities with frequencies
inputs.previous_psur: blocked — D7: reporting_period_end 2023-03-31 overlaps new period start 2023-01-01 (9-month overlap); all keys present; summary nearly empty (D8 narrative thin)
inputs.literature: pending — 8 articles, columns exact, all 2023; Phase 7 content review outstanding
inputs.external_events: pending — 10 rows, columns exact, serious in {0,1}; includes competitor models (ledger #4); Phase 7 review outstanding

deterministic_log.columns: all 6 CSVs match locked API column sets exactly; all JSON key trees match server/specs.py
deterministic_log.region_tier1: United Kingdom (sales 12, complaints 6) valid bucket; Turkey rule not triggered
deterministic_log.deid_scan: 0 PII hits in description/narrative/root_cause/investigation_findings/outcome across complaints + external_events

declarations.D1: PARTIAL — Class IIb Rule 10 (EU+UK), UKCA marked, NB BSI NL (2797), CE since 2015; implantable? legacy status? custom-made? — awaiting user (five confirmations)

declarations.D4: OPEN — four-year history not asked yet

inference_ledger.resolution: already raw fractions — no conversion applied
inference_ledger.rationale: all values <= 0.005 and mutually consistent with raw complaint-rate scale; per-1000 reading would imply absurd 0.0000005 true rates
inference_ledger.regulatory_basis: RACT O1-O5 occurrence thresholds (constraints/ract_occurrence_codes.json) compare raw rates

inference_ledger.resolution: IMDRF Annex A/F coding dictionary — reference material, NOT part of the locked POST /runs payload
inference_ledger.rationale: key names match IMDRF annex structure; /defaults input set does not include it
inference_ledger.regulatory_basis: IMDRF Annex A (device problem) / Annex F (health impact) terminologies

inference_ledger.item: device_model reconciliation: data 'Stapler-X100' vs device_context catalog numbers
inference_ledger.input_value: CSVs use device_model=Stapler-X100; device_context.model_or_catalog_numbers = [LSX100, LSX100-Reload, LSX100-Std]
inference_ledger.resolution: provisionally treated as the same device family (trade name matches exactly: Laparoscopic Stapler X100)
inference_ledger.rationale: device_name matches device_trade_names verbatim, but the model string in the CSVs matches no catalog number
inference_ledger.regulatory_basis: MDCG 2022-21 §Device identification — models covered by the PSUR must be unambiguous

inference_ledger.resolution: retained — external vigilance-database results for similar devices belong in Section K
inference_ledger.rationale: MDCG 2022-21 external-database review explicitly covers similar devices on the market
inference_ledger.regulatory_basis: MDCG 2022-21 Table 10 (external database searches, similar devices)

blockers_open: B1-REGION: R2 reject-list values — sales.region {NorthAmerica:12, Europe:12}, complaints.region {Europe:14, NorthAmerica:12}, fsca.regions_affected all 3 rows {NorthAmerica, Europe, Asia}. classify_country_to_psur_region() (statistics_tables.py:127) has no entry for any of these; all fall to Rest of World silently, zeroing EEA+TR+XI tables. Not inferable — country-level re-export required (Tier 3).
B2-NI-SPLIT: UK rows present (sales 12, complaints 6). Need explicit answer whether any volume is Northern Ireland (NI -> EEA+TR+XI, GB -> United Kingdom). Combined figures containing NI = blocker.

B3-D7-CONTIGUITY: previous PSUR PSUR001 reporting_period_end 2023-03-31 vs new period 2023-01-01..2023-12-31 — 9-month overlap. Either the previous end date is wrong, the new period should be 2023-04-01..2024-03-31, or a documented deviation + comparability statement is required.

B4-FIVE-CONFIRMATIONS: (1) single-use => denominator = units sold; (2) Class IIb Rule 10 => annual PSUR; (3) implantable? (stapler is not, but deployed titanium staples remain in the patient — needs explicit ruling, affects cadence + 44ZQ retention); (4) UK trio read-back (all three filled; consistent with UK sales); (5) legacy status (CE 2015 — MDR-certified via BSI NL 2797, or legacy MDD?).

B5-DECLARATIONS: D2 counting criterion, D3 population exposure, D4 four-year history, D6 cover-page identity (SRN, legal manufacturer, EU AR, PSUR reference number, version), D8 action statuses, D9 CAPA scope.
notes: PSUR API service verified locally (GET /defaults reachable, schema path = API, server/specs.py contract). Mock pack columns are already in locked shape; zero column-mapping inferences required.
